title: Kuçi Defence Rule 68(2) Request for Remote Attendance, with one public annex
text:
KSC-BC-2023-12/F00843/1 of 2 PUBLIC
A01 02/04/2026 15:27:00
02/04/2026 15:27:00
In: KSC-BC-2023-12
Specialist Prosecutor v. Hashim Thaçi, Bashkim Smakaj, Isni
Kilaj, Fadil Fazliu and Hajredin Kuçi
Before: Single Trial Judge
Judge Christopher Gosnell
Registrar: Dr Fidelma Donlon
Filing Participant: Specialist Counsel for Hajredin Kuçi
Date: 2 April 2026
Language: English
Classification: Public
Kuçi Defence Rule 68(2) Request for Remote Attendance, with one public annex
’s
Specialist Prosecutor Office Specialist Counsel for Hashim Thaçi
Sophie Menegon
Kimberly P. West
Luka Misetic
Specialist Counsel for Bashkim Smakaj
Jonathan Elystan Rees KC
Huw Bowden
Specialist Counsel for Isni Kilaj
Iain Edwards
Joe Holmes
Specialist Counsel for Fadil Fazliu
David A. Young
Specialist Counsel for Hajredin Kuçi
Alexander Admiraal

KSC-BC-2023-12/F00843/2 of 2 PUBLIC
02/04/2026 15:27:00
1. Pursuant to Rule 68(2) of the Rules of Procedure and Evidence, the Defence
hereby respectfully requests the Single Trial Judge to authorise that Mr Kuçi
will attend the presentation of the Defence evidence remotely via video-
conference.
2. The waiver signed by Mr Kuçi is filed as public Annex 1.
[Word count: 174 words]
Respectfully submitted,
Alexander Admiraal
Counsel for Hajredin Kuçi
2 April 2026
Amsterdam, the Netherlands
KSC-BC-2023-12 1 2 April 2026
